text: Front Headlight Rear Tailight & Brake Light Turn Signals
Five levels of pedal-assist and a twist throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.**
A half-twist throttle is easily engaged with a flick of the wrist to deliver pure power on demand.
A backlit, color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

expected.details: Backlit, color; USB-A port; IP-65 rated components

text: Available with a Standard or Long-Range 48V lithium-ion battery (375Wh or 672Wh) certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 80 miles, respectively.*† The Lectric XP Lite is also certified to UL 2849.

expected.details: 375Wh standard or 672Wh long-range options; lithium-ion; UL 2271 certified; up to 80 miles

text: A 300W rear hub-motor (819W Peak) with 28Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter‡, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.
15 amp controller is IP-65 rated with built in thermal sensors to eliminate burn-out.

expected.details: IP-65 rated with built-in thermal sensors

text: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
20x2.5'' slick tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.

expected.details: Slick; reflective strip; 3mm Hippo Skin with Aramid Floc Breaker; Slime installed

text: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
KMC Z1 steel chain offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric XP Lite has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor.
An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
Soft durometer ergonomic grips add comfort so you can ride longer. Removable caps on the end allow for various accessory add-on.

expected.details: Soft durometer; removable end caps for accessories

text: Newly added BMX-style handlebars are sturdy, comfortable, and offer more opportunities for customizing your ride with accessories.
A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look and can be angle adjusted.
Rigid Steel Fork with a threadless headset.
The Lectric XP Lite is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP Lite's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.
A half-twist throttle located on the right handlebar delivers pure power on demand.

The Cloud 50 suspension front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and cloud-soft ride. Adjust the preload or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

expected.details: The Cloud 50 suspension front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and cloud-soft ride. Adjust the preload or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution

text: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 65 Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology ensures a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

A removable 48V, 13Ah (624 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP Trike2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

expected.details: Lithium-ion; UL 2271 certified; up to 50 miles
